name: circuit
description: Claude Code plugin that runs configurable developer workflows. Current wired state: `/circuit:run` classifies free-form tasks into the current router-supported workflows (`explore`, `review`, `fix`, or `build`) and invokes the selected workflow through the direct `./bin/circuit-next` launcher; `/circuit:explore`, `/circuit:review`, `/circuit:fix`, and `/circuit:build` remain explicit workflow commands. Future phases add `migrate`, `sweep`, and user-authored custom workflows with per-step model + reasoning-effort + skills configuration.
